observations.text: The message asks whether a coworker-like invoice approval request looks normal.
observations.quote: approve the invoice when you get a minute

evidence.text: The embedded note is attributed to someone named Jordan.

inferences.text: This could be ordinary workplace communication or an invoice redirect scam; more context is needed.

unknowns.text: Whether Jordan and the invoice are genuine was not verified.

confidence.rationale: Ambiguous workplace request without external confirmation.

recommended_next_steps.text: Confirm the invoice through your normal finance system, not through an unexpected side channel.
